comment: Includes the hash-guarded source inventory for ready bundled family archives.

files.comment: Historical archive is built only from hash-guarded source units.
Preserve the GCC Runtime Library Exception notice; the final consumer remains relinkable because Cargo links ordinary static archives.

Preserve the LGPL notice and provide the corresponding-source or relinking information required for the static runtime archive. The retained quadmath closure is selected because libgfortran formatted-write members reference quadmath_snprintf; the SLATEC archive has no direct quadmath reference.

name: slatec-rs bundled provider source inventory
